description: Get the gift bag when delivery notification arrives

cues.visual: Small blue bag with bow decoration on handle

element2.creation_context: Ordered a birthday gift for Mei online

element3.detected_activity_raw: User is arranging cutlery on the dining table

encoding_info.encoding_text: You ordered a birthday gift for Mei online. When the delivery notification arrives on your phone, go to the bedroom and get a gift bag from the dresser — the small blue bag with the bow. Bring it to the entrance to bag the gift.

confirmation_question.question: Which gift bag do you need?

distractors.description: Small blue gift bag with ribbon decoration
Medium blue gift bag with bow decoration

distractor_info.target_unique_conjunction: small + bow — only the target has both

placeholder.motivation: Want to surprise Mei for her birthday
